toolPurpose: Search for places by keyword, location, category, or nearby coordinates. Returns a list of venues with basic information including name, location, Foursquare ID (fsq_id), distance, and relevance ranking.

ll.description: Search by latitude and longitude (format: 'lat,lng' e.g., '40.7128,-74.0060'). Required if 'near' is not provided.

near.description: Search near a location by address or place name (e.g., 'New York, NY' or 'Times Square'). Required if 'll' is not provided.

categories.description: Filter by Foursquare category IDs (e.g., ['13000', '13001'] for restaurants). Use single or multiple categories.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10, max: 50)

sort.description: Sort results by distance or relevance

toolPurpose: Retrieve comprehensive details about a specific place including full address, phone number, website, hours of operation, ratings, review count, categories, and additional metadata.

fsq_id.description: Foursquare place ID (obtained from place search results)

fields.description: Specific fields to retrieve to optimize API performance (e.g., 'name', 'location', 'hours', 'rating', 'photos', 'tel'). Specify only needed fields.

toolPurpose: Retrieve a collection of photos for a specific place. Returns photo URLs, classifications (food, place, user), and metadata. Useful for visual venue research and gallery displays.

fsq_id.description: Foursquare place ID (obtained from place search or details)

limit.description: Maximum number of photos to return (default: 10, max: 50)

sort.description: Sort photos by newest first or by popularity

toolPurpose: Retrieve user-submitted tips, reviews, and recommendations for a specific place. Returns tip text, author, like count, and creation date. Provides community insights and feedback about venues.

fsq_id.description: Foursquare place ID (obtained from place search or details)

limit.description: Maximum number of tips to return (default: 10, max: 100)

sort.description: Sort tips by newest first or by popularity (likes)

toolPurpose: Provide intelligent autocomplete suggestions for place queries. Returns matching place names with Foursquare IDs, locations, and categories. Useful for type-ahead search interfaces and query refinement.

query.description: Partial place name or search term for autocomplete (e.g., 'Times', 'starbucks', 'eiffel')

ll.description: Bias autocomplete results to a location (format: 'lat,lng' e.g., '40.7128,-74.0060'). Results within proximity are preferred.

radius.description: Autocomplete search radius in meters when ll is provided (default: 40000, max: 100000)

limit.description: Maximum number of autocomplete results to return (default: 10, max: 25)
